common.tagline: Words left by people around here

here.intro: Opens the log for where you are right now. Your exact location is never stored.
here.request: Open the log for this area
here.denied: We can't open nearby logs without your location.
here.deniedHint: Please allow location access in your browser settings and try again.

cell.title: Words from this area
cell.subtitle: Anonymous notes from people who were around here
cell.empty: No one has written here yet.
cell.emptyCta: Why not leave the first note?
cell.placeholder: Describe the vibe of this place
cell.guideline: Describe the place, not people. Real names, comments on appearance, or references to specific people may be hidden.
cell.pendingNotice: Your post will appear after review.

errors.rateLimited: Please wait a while and try again.
errors.cellMismatch: You can only post from where you are now.
errors.lowAccuracy: Location accuracy is too low. Try outdoors.
